title: Papercutting tools — knives, scissors, and surfaces
sources: SYNTHESISED — general papercutting practice; no single PD canonical source
notes: Reading guide: scalpel vs craft knife (scalpel for intricate work, the 10A blade's belly allows tight curves), small scissors for jianzhi-style cutting, the Swann Morton blade range, cutting mats (self-healing A4 for papercutting), using a light box for template transfer. Safety: cutting preamble applies.
